decision_text: Adopt Azure Functions (serverless) over Azure App Service for the calculation engine
rationale: Serverless provides cost-efficient scaling for variable broker calculation load. No persistent state required.

decision_text: Azure SQL over Cosmos DB for rules storage
rationale: Credit policy rules are relational and structured. SQL provides ACID guarantees needed for policy enforcement. Cosmos DB overhead not justified.

decision_text: Azure Entra External ID as CDR-compliant authorisation server
rationale: Entra supports OIDC, FAPI 1.0 Advanced, PAR, DCR natively. Avoids build of custom auth server. Stays within M365 security perimeter.

decision_text: Cosmos DB for consent store over SQL
rationale: Consent arrangements have flexible schema and high read throughput requirements. Cosmos DB provides globally distributed, low-latency reads.

decision_text: Dataverse as schema-first system of record replacing the legacy EA repository
rationale: Dataverse is native to M365, has a relational model, native Power BI connector, and audit trail. Zero additional licensing. Legacy tool is SaaS with limited query capability.
risk: Low — PoC required before full commitment

decision_text: Mermaid.js over Visio for diagram generation
rationale: Mermaid markup is text-based and generatable by AI agents from schema fields. No file attachments, no diagram drift. Rendered natively in Power Pages and Confluence.
risk: Low — diagrams are less rich than Visio but fit-for-purpose

decision_text: Snowflake on GCP over Azure Synapse
rationale: Snowflake provides superior data sharing, cross-cloud querying, and separation of compute and storage. AA assessed three options — Snowflake scored highest on all guardrails.
risk: Medium — GCP data residency requires CISO exception

decision_text: Azure ML over third-party fraud ML platform
rationale: Azure ML keeps data within the bank Azure tenancy. Avoids data egress to external ML vendor. Integrates natively with Azure Functions scoring pipeline.
risk: High — model governance framework must be established before production

decision_text: MuleSoft Anypoint for CRM integration layer
rationale: Salesforce acquisition of MuleSoft provides native integration. Pre-built Temenos connector available.
risk: High — MuleSoft not on approved components list. Under review for addition.

decision_text: Single Entra External ID tenant for all brands (Coastal and Summit)
rationale: Unified identity reduces operational overhead and enables cross-brand SSO. Brand separation maintained via custom domains and user flows.
risk: Medium — brand isolation testing required before production
